description_long: This stuffed toy features a rounded, bear-like body with a predominantly dark gray lower half and a soft pink upper half, including the head and tail. Its face is adorned with a white snout, a small black nose, and a wide, friendly smile, while the eyes are simple black dots that give it a cheerful and approachable expression. The toy has large, white, rounded ears and a tuft of pink fur on top of its head, adding to its playful appearance. Its arms are outstretched and cylindrical, matching the dark gray color of its lower body, and its legs are short with small, white paw details. The tail is thick and ringed with alternating pink and darker pink stripes, extending straight out from the back. The overall design is soft, plush, and inviting, making it suitable for children or as a decorative item in urban environments like parks or playgrounds.
description: A soft, plush bear-like stuffed toy with a pink and gray color scheme, outstretched arms, and a striped tail. It has a friendly, smiling face and large, rounded ears.
description_view_0: Front view shows the smiling face, white snout, large ears, outstretched arms, and small paw details on the feet.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the rounded body, protruding snout, ear profile, and the striped tail extending backward.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full length of the pink-striped tail, the back of the head with a pink tuft, and the symmetry of the arms.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the side profile of the face, ear, and the tail's attachment.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is cheerful and friendly, with a wide, smiling mouth and simple, round black eyes. The overall look is inviting and happy.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with both arms outstretched to the sides and legs slightly apart. The head is facing forward, and the tail extends straight back.
